subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God! The signs of divine power are manifest in all things even as the sun, yet the blind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان الهی آثار قدرت الهی در جمیع اشیاء مانند آفتاب آشکار ولی کوران این
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @light and darkness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
